description.content: Operations on Dataproc clusters
Lists all regions/{region}/clusters in a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Create a cluster

request.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Create a cluster

description.content: Creates a cluster in a project. The returned Operation.metadata will be ClusterOperationMetadata.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Get a cluster

request.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Get a cluster

description.content: Gets the resource representation for a cluster in a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Update a cluster

request.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Update a cluster

description.content: Updates a cluster in a project. The returned Operation.metadata will be ClusterOperationMetadata.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Delete a cluster

request.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Delete a cluster

description.content: Deletes a cluster in a project. The returned Operation.metadata will be ClusterOperationMetadata.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Operations on Dataproc jobs
Lists regions/{region}/jobs in a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Submit a job

request.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Submit a job

description.content: Submits a job to a cluster.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Get a job

request.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Get a job

description.content: Gets the resource representation for a job in a project.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Delete a job

request.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Delete a job

description.content: Deletes the job from the project. After deletion, the job metadata is not retrievable.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Cancel a job

request.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Cancel a job

description.content: Starts a job cancellation request.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Operations on workflow templates

item.name: Google Cloud Dataproc List workflow templates

request.name: Google Cloud Dataproc List workflow templates

description.content: Lists workflows that match the specified filter in the request.

response.name: Successful response

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Create a workflow template

request.name: Google Cloud Dataproc Create a workflow template

description.content: Creates new workflow template.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
(Required)

The Cloud Dataproc API manages Hadoop-based clusters and jobs on Google Cloud Platform. It provides programmatic access to create and manage clusters, submit and monitor Apache Spark, Apache Hadoop, Apache Hive, and Apache Pig jobs, and manage workflow templates for orchestrating multi-step data processing pipelines.
